true_header: Marie Canyon Green Streets ¾ Updates:

PCH Median Improvements Project ¾ Updates:  The project was approved by the Planning Commission on September 8, 2021. This project requires Caltrans approval since the work will be on  Pacific  Coast  Highway.  The  project  reports  and  plans  are  being routed  through  Caltrans  for  final  approval.    It  is  anticipated  that  the project  will  have  final  approval  by  March  2022.    The  project  will  be
PCH Signal Synchronization System Improvements Project
Civic Center Water Treatment Facility Phase 2

Permanent Skate Park ¾ Project Description:  This project includes the designing and constructing a permanent skate park located on the Crummer/Case Court parcel adjacent to Malibu Bluffs Park.  The project would include parking and additional site amenities such as trash cans, benches, tables, and restrooms.
PCH at Trancas Canyon Road Right Turn Lane
Trancas Playground Resurfacing ¾ Project Description:  The project will include removing and replacing the upper layer of the playground surfacing at Trancas Canyon Park.
PCH Median Improvements at Paradise Cove and Zuma Beach
Broad Beach Road Water Quality Infrastructure Repairs (CalJPIA Project)
Latigo Canyon Road Roadway/Retaining Wall Improvements (FEMA Project)
Trancas Canyon Park Planting and Irrigation Repairs (CalJPIA/FEMA Project)
Trancas Canyon Park Slope Stabilization Project (CalJPIA Project)
Corral Canyon Road Bridge Repairs (FEMA Project) ¾ Project Description:  This project consisted of replacing fire damaged existing fencing and repairing the damaged embankment adjacent to the bridge.
Latigo Canyon Road Culvert Repairs (FEMA Project)
Encinal Canyon Road Drainage Improvements (CalOES Project)
Malibu Road Slope Repairs (CalOES Project) ¾ Project Description:  The existing slope adjacent to the beach access stairs at 24712 Malibu Road has been eroded and caused damage to Malibu Road.
Westward Beach Road Shoulder Repairs (CalOES Project)
Disaster Projects (Construction) None at this time

PCH Median Improvements Project ¾ Updates:  Consultant  has submitted the final design changes to Caltrans. Staff received  the  project’s  CDP  from  the  Planning  Commission.    Staff  is coordinating  with  Caltrans  for  the  final  project  approvals.    Interviews were  conducted  with  qualified  consultants  to  provide  construction management  services  in  October  and  staff  is  in  the  final  stages  of selecting a firm. ¾ Project Schedule:
PCH Signal Synchronization System Improvements Project
Civic Center Water Treatment Facility Phase 2
PCH at Trancas Canyon Road Right Turn Lane ¾ Project Description:  This project consists of installing a new westbound right

Vehicle Protection Devices ¾ Project Description:  Per Malibu Municipal Code Section 17.48.070 requires vehicle impact protection devices to be installed for all parking spaces located adjacent  to  any  outdoor  pedestrian  seating  area.    There  are  two  locations within the City’s right-of-way  and City-owned property that would require a vehicle impact protection device.
Malibu Bluffs Park South Walkway ¾ Project Description:  This project will include replacing the existing sidewalk located on the south side of Malibu Bluffs Park.
Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure ¾ Updates: The contractor has completed construction of the new concrete weir wall located inside LA County box culvert.
